Class CocoCampaignConfig.CampaignSection

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.coco.config.CocoCampaignConfig.CampaignSection
Enclosing class:
CocoCampaignConfig
public static final class CocoCampaignConfig.CampaignSection extends Object
Global campaign settings.
